channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's China Visit and Inflation Concerns
item.description: President Trump is traveling to Beijing for a state visit. An upcoming inflation report will analyze the impact of conflict in Iran.

item.title: Transportation Secretary Duffy appeared in a reality show, backed by regulated companies
item.description: Secretary Duffy and his family participated in a cross-country program. Organizers state the project received no taxpayer funding, but concerns have been raised.

item.title: One Year with AI: Lessons Learned
item.description: Tech writer Joanna Stern experimented with AI for a year, using it for tasks like reading medical reports and texting. She details her experience.

item.title: Inflation rises to highest level since 2023
item.description: Gasoline prices contributed to inflation reaching a near three-year high in April, with consumer prices increasing 3.8% year-over-year.
